/cvmfs/icecube.opensciencegrid.org/py3-v4.4.0/RHEL_9_x86_64_v2/bin/c++  -std=c++17 -DBOOST_LOG_DYN_LINK -rdynamic CMakeFiles/tsmc.dir/private/tsmc.cxx.o CMakeFiles/tsmc.dir/private/solardipole.cc.o -o bin/tsmc  -Wl,-rpath,/cvmfs/icecube.opensciencegrid.org/py3-v4.3.0/RHEL_9_x86_64/lib /cvmfs/icecube.opensciencegrid.org/py3-v4.3.0/RHEL_9_x86_64/lib/libpal.so /cvmfs/icecube.opensciencegrid.org/py3-v4.3.0/RHEL_9_x86_64/lib/libcfitsio.so /cvmfs/icecube.opensciencegrid.org/py3-v4.3.0/RHEL_9_x86_64/lib/libhealpix_cxx.so /cvmfs/icecube.opensciencegrid.org/py3-v4.3.0/RHEL_9_x86_64/lib/libboost_system.so.1.82.0 /cvmfs/icecube.opensciencegrid.org/py3-v4.3.0/RHEL_9_x86_64/lib/libboost_filesystem.so.1.82.0 /cvmfs/icecube.opensciencegrid.org/py3-v4.3.0/RHEL_9_x86_64/lib/libboost_program_options.so.1.82.0 /cvmfs/icecube.opensciencegrid.org/py3-v4.3.0/RHEL_9_x86_64/lib/libboost_iostreams.so.1.82.0 -lboost_log /cvmfs/icecube.opensciencegrid.org/py3-v4.3.0/RHEL_9_x86_64/lib/libboost_atomic.so.1.82.0
